content.content:
<gap:target id="wishlists-table">
      CREATE TABLE <gap:target id="wishlists-table-name">wishlists</gap:target> (
        <gap:target id="wishlists-id-column">id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY</gap:target>,
        <gap:target id="wishlists-user-id-column">user_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE</gap:target>,
        <gap:target id="wishlists-product-id-column">product_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE</gap:target>,
        <gap:target id="wishlists-added-at-column">added_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()</gap:target>,
        <gap:target id="wishlists-unique-user-product">CONSTRAINT wishlists_user_product_unique UNIQUE (user_id, product_id)</gap:target>
      );
    </gap:target>
